title: Ensure public network access is Disabled on Virtual Networks

remediation_metadata.impact_statement: Leaving public access enabled on Virtual Networks allows malicious internet traffic to scan or exploit internal assets.
remediation_metadata.validation_steps: Verify public network access is disabled on Virtual Networks in Azure Portal under network properties or run az network vnet show.

templates.azure_cli: az network vnet update --name {{ resource.name }} --public-network-access Disabled
